title: MedieCraft
description: A Medieval and Roguelike Minecraft experience
body:
![MedieCraftTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc70e7d58ed927fcb2a35801b52201f3df18aafb.png)

![MedieCraft_HeroImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ffb4b9c83af622396283656f9a24c690b1ec5bc_0.webp)

**This modpack has been created with the aim of rediscovering the game through an ultra-immersive, challenging world full of new things to discover throughout your adventure.**

**Roam the world, traverse biomes and worlds, fight monsters on the prowl, and explore structures and dungeons to make your armor and weapons. Forget boring mining sessions and prepare yourself for an unforgettable experience with your friends.**

**This modpack is very challenging by setting game difficulty to normal or hard. If you want to explore the world and chill, easy difficulty is recommended. Good luck if you want to play in hardcore. ;)**
_________________________

- 🐓 **New mobs and more mob variants**
- 🍅 **More plants**
- 🏛 **Enhanced structures** and new ones
- 🛖 **Themed villages** and **structures** 
- ⛰️ **Beautiful landscapes** with new and **larger biomes** using Terralith and Tectonic
- ⚔️ **Dungeons**, **mobs**, **structures** to build your stuff using battles instead of mining
- 🎑 **Ultra immersive environment sounds and songs**
- 🪓 **Realistic trees**
- 🗡 **New tools and weapons**
- 🏞 **Beautiful** and **immersive resource packs**
- 🔦 **Dynamic Lights**
- 🎙 **Proximity chat** (with voice effects depending on the environment)
- 🧟‍♂️ **Ultra realistic mob movements** with Fresh Animations
- 👹 **More monsters and bosses**
- 🌋 **Better Nether**
- 👁 **Better End**
- ⚡️ **Hyper fast and ultra optimized**
- 👥 **Add friends, send message, share screenshot and play together with ease** using Essential mod
- 🔥 **Very challenging**

**✅ Also included in this modpack:**
- 💥 **Enhanced particles and effects**
- ✨️ **Butter smooth GUI**
- 🏔️ **Distant Horizon and BSL shaders** for beautiful effects and world views

# **Compatibility**

✅ MedieCraft

✅ MedieCraft - Lite

✅ MedieCraft - Server

❌ MedieCraft - Cross-Platform

❌ MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform

❌ MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform

❌ MC Bedrock Clients

❌ MC Java Clients (using Fabric, ViaVersion, ViaFabric, CreativeCore and GeckoLib)

# **Key notes**
- **Client side modpack** (necessary to play in solo worlds and in server worlds using [MedieCraft - Server])
- **Highly Detailed ModPack** (check [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) if you don't have a dedicated graphics card)
- The mod list is available by clicking on 'versions' and then on the version number you chose to install.
- If your **game is lagging**, you can disable all added particles in 'Video Settings' menu, as well as shaders if you want to decrease/increase quality. Keep in mind that Distant Horizon is quite hard to run smoothly on mid-end PCs, you can disable or tweak it in the settings, beside the FOV setting.

# **System Requirements**
**Minimal System Requirements (without shaders & without Distant Horizon mod)**

- 2GB allocated to Minecraft

- 4 Cores / 4-8 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 3 3100, Intel Core i5 7400)

- NVIDIA GeForce GT 1050Ti 4GB, RX 560 4GB

- 8Gb RAM 

- 1,5GB SSD storage


**Recommended System Requirements (w/ shaders & without Distant Horizon mod)**

- 4GB allocated to Minecraft

- 6 Cores / 12 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 5 5600, Intel Core i5 12400F)

- NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6GB, AMD Radeon RX580 8GB

- 16GB RAM

- 1,5GB SSD storage


**Optimal System Requirements (w/ shaders ultra preset & Distant Horizon mod)**

- 6-8GB allocated to Minecraft (depending on Distant Horizon configuration)

- 8 Cores / 16 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 7 5700X, Intel Core i7 12700)

- NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060, AMD Radeon Vega 56

- 32GB RAM

- 1,5GB SSD storage

# **Instructions**

1. Download this modpack with the version you chose or the same version running your server.
2. Go to your Modrinth library and click on 'Play'. Game should start and you are ready to go!


# **Q&A**

- **Why is there a [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) modpack ? What's the difference between the two ?**

[MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) (this one) has many client side mods that improve quality of life like [Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui), [Camera Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul), [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular), [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders), [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) and many other mods compared to [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) which doesn't.

- **Is this modpack compatible with [MedieCraft - Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server) ?** 

Absolutely, using this modpack you can join your solo worlds as well as servers using the [MedieCraft - Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server) modpack on server side.

- **How much RAM should I allocate to this modpack profile ?**

6GB minimum if you are using [BSL shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) and [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons). 4GB should be fine by disabling them.

- **Can I play this modpack in older versions of Minecraft ?**

Yes, to be able to play in older versions, you have to unlink the modpack at the very bottom of the modpack options. Then change the version of Minecraft and update all mods by clicking on 'update mods'. Start the game and it should launch if all mods are compatible with the selected version of Minecraft.

- **Is this modpack Cross-Platform ?**

No, but I recreated this modpack with only Cross-Platform mods. See [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform).

- **Can I use this modpack with a server running [MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server-cross-platform) ?** 

No, a network protocol error will be raised. See [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform).



# **Credits**
💙 Huge thanks to Maffhew with his Excalibur resource pack for giving me the idea of creating this resource pack. I honored him by putting his resource pack icon to my modpack ! The resource pack is in this modpack !
